commands.review_summary:
This PR refactors app-specific password redaction into explicit credential, generic wordlist, unclassified context-anchor, and secret-context fail-closed tiers, with regression tests for the redactor.

PR surface: Source +401, Tests +201. Total +602 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main broadly scans generic structured fields and persists redactSecrets output, while PR head preserves generic all-word tokens before checking Apple/iCloud context.
